title: Learning Techniques Path
description: Build fluency in Learning Techniques inside Reinforcement Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.
featuredTermTitles: RLHF Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback

steps.title: Imitation Learning
steps.summary: A type of learning where an agent learns to mimic the behavior of another agent or expert. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Learning Techniques. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into imitation learning agents and Offline Imitation Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: RLHF Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback
steps.summary: RLHF Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Learning Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Learning Techniques. Start after Reinforcement Learning Algorithms and Q-Learning. It opens into Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) and RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Imitation Learning Techniques
steps.summary: Imitation Learning Techniques belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Learning Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Learning Techniques. Start after Imitation Learning and Q-Learning. It opens into Imitation Learning Extensions Techniques and Imitation Learning Techniques Extensions.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

Start after Imitation Learning and Q-Learning. It opens into Variational Adversarial Imitation Learning and Generative Adversarial Imitation Learning.

steps.title: Imitation Learning Enhancements
steps.summary: Imitation Learning Enhancements belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Learning Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Learning Techniques. Start after Imitation Learning and Q-Learning. It opens into Imitation Learning Extensions Enhancements and Imitation Learning Techniques Extensions Enhancements.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback)
steps.summary: RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) belongs to the Reinforcement Learning area of AI/ML, within Learning Techniques. It sits inside Reinforcement Learning / Learning Techniques. Start after RLHF Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback and Reinforcement Learning with Human Feedback (RLHF). It opens into fine-tuning with RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
